/usr/lib/ccache/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdumme_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libdumme_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/dumme_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/dumme_msgs/srv/euler_to_quaternion__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dumme_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/dumme_msgs/srv/quaternion_to_euler__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
